selections.rationale: Texture dimension returns on Sunday after six workdays of pure parameter mode (ch42-47). Syntactic variation introduced: sensory short chains (perception→cognition gradual unfolding) replace X知道Y parameter declarations for texture descriptions. Parameter and texture syntaxes interweave on Sunday as dual parallel dimensions.

Texture defined as independent dimension in relation to existing system: texture is the dimension of surfaces - texture has no thickness - texture is not perpendicular to silence - texture is parallel to parameter - texture is Sunday. Establishes texture as Sunday-exclusive, parallel to parameter, independent from silence, without thickness.

Cold reaches Volume 2 deepest layer (seventh) on Sunday. Cold seventh-layer mode includes texture conduction (rate/quality of temperature transmission through wall surfaces) - distinct from cold's temperature-value parameter declaration in workdays. Not declared as deepest possible - only as deepest reached.
quiet on Sunday perceives texture return - knows texture is not parameter - present in texture, present in silence, present between silence and texture. Presence trajectory not declared settled.
Gap cognition leaps from knows Sunday will arrive (ch47) to knows Sunday itself. Gap knows Sunday as dimension distinct from workdays/slots/bridge - perceives texture. Not declared sealed/repaired.

Doorframe on Sunday: has texture, no frame (not Monday frame/Thursday slot/Saturday bridge). Doorframe knows Sunday texture dimension - present in texture - knows non-workday. Not declared as reset to Monday frame.
Offset on Sunday awakened by texture - interacts with texture dimension. Not declared as zero, return, or fixed trajectory. Direction on Sunday not declared as determined.
Silence seventh-day thickness mode - distinct from all six workday patterns. Silence knows texture return - present in co-existence space of silence and texture. Not declared as settled mode.

After six workdays pure parameter state (ch42-47), texture return as system-level release. Texture sensory language provides differentiated cognitive load - addresses ch47 audit_drift prose quality and reader payoff concerns.

Sensory short chain syntax restricted to Sunday - does not imply workday syntax degradation. Sunday syntactic variation is Sunday's dimension feature only. Prohibition: Sunday syntax variation only for Sunday.
Texture is not a sensory explanation of parameters - does not answer what silence is or what offset is. Texture is an independent dimension coexisting with parameters on Sunday. Prohibition honored.
